q: Niraj is at the 16th position from the top of his class and at the 26th position from the bottom. How many students are there in the class?

Below are given some statements followed by some conclusions. Taking the given statements to be true even if they seem to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the conclusions logically follows from the statements. Statements: (I) All teachers are professors. All professors are doctors. Conclusions: (I) Some doctors are teachers. (II) All teachers are doctors.

In a certain code language, P + Q means P is the father of Q, P x Q means P is the daughter of Q, P $ Q means P is the wife of Q, and P & Q means P is the son of Q. Then, which of the following shows that K is the wife of M? Given: C $ A v V & G # K $ B
o: P is the daughter of T
P is the wife of T
P is the sister of T
P is the wife of K

q: The following five three-digit numbers are based on a rule: (numbers) 658 223 661 257 666. (Direction) If the smallest digit of each number is added to the third digit of that number, then what will be the resultant of the third highest number?
If '+' means 'x', 'x' means '-', '-' means '÷' and '÷' means '+', then what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation? 205 - 3 + 262 x 212 ÷ 4 = ?
In a certain language, 'ZEST' is written as '4875' and 'BEST' is written as '5781'. In that language, what is the code for the letter 'Z'?
In a certain code language, 'TIME' is coded as '5046' and 'MINE' is coded as '4609'. In the same language, what is the code for the letter 'N'?
What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following series? 56 76 96 116 136 ?
QFVT is related to LHQV based on a certain logic. Similarly, ABFP is related to VDAR. Following the same logic, to which of the following is FZKN related?
If '+' and '-' are interchanged and 'x' and '÷' are interchanged, then what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation? 208 - 117 x 9 + 5 x 215 = ?

Seven people A, B, C, D, E and F are sitting in a row, all facing the front. D is at one of the ends. There are three people between G and D. There are three people between A and B. C is to the immediate left of B. C is not at any end. A is third to the right of C. Who is sitting at the right end?

On the basis of a certain logic, the given number-cluster on the left is related to the letter-cluster on the right. On the same basis, which of the following number-clusters is NOT related to its corresponding letter-cluster? (Note: arithmetic operations are to be performed on the numbers themselves without splitting them into their constituent digits.)

On the basis of a certain logic, the given number-cluster on the left is related to the letter-cluster on the right. On the same basis, which of the following number-clusters is NOT related to its corresponding letter-cluster? (Note: arithmetic operations are to be performed on the numbers themselves without splitting them into their constituent digits.)

Eight friends A, B, C, D, E, M, N, Q and R are sitting around a circular table facing the centre. A is third to the left of N. There are two people between A and B. B is to the immediate right of Q. M is third to the right of B. Q is to the immediate left of R. Who is sitting between M and B?
What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following series? 342 352 360 366 370 ?

Seven people A, B, C, D, E and F are sitting in a row, all facing the front. A is to the immediate left of D. There are two people between B and E. F is to the immediate left of A. C is to the immediate right of D. Who is sitting at the right end?
GIJ is related to MNJ on the basis of a certain logic. On the same basis, XU is related to 24 (XU 22). On the same basis, to which of the following is KU related?

Select the set in which the numbers are related to each other in the same way as the numbers of the following sets are related. (Note: the operations on the numbers should be performed without breaking them down into their constituent digits. e.g. 13 - the operations to be performed on 13 such as adding/subtracting/multiplying 13 etc. can be performed; breaking 13 into 1 and 3 and then performing operations on 1 and 3 is not allowed.) (8, 26, 48) (10, 28, 50)
Which of the following options will logically complete the given series so that it is correct? TLD, WOG, ZRJ, CUM, ?
Which of the following options will logically complete the given series so that it is correct? LEX 14, OHA 23, RKD 32, UNG 41, XQJ 50, ?
What will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following series? 253 243 234 ? 219 213

A truck starts from B and travels 45 km towards the south. Then it turns right and travels 54 km. Then it turns right again and travels 63 km. Then it again turns right and travels 9 km. Then it turns left and travels another some distance. In which direction and how far is the truck now from its starting point B? (Note: all turns are of 90° only, as shown in the figure.)
If '-' means 'x', '÷' means '+', '+' means '-' and 'x' means '÷', then what will come in place of the question mark (?) in the following equation? 18 - 13 + 82 x 2 = ?
In June 2025, who was awarded the United Nations Sasakawa Award 2025 for Disaster Risk Reduction, for exceptional contributions to tropical cyclone forecasting and warning systems?
Which Indian state recorded the highest growth in apple production according to the Centre for Monitoring Indian Economy (CMIE) report 2024-25?
Whose name was proposed as the new chairman by the selection committee headed by Lokpal of India (LPAI) chairman Justice (Retd.) A.M. Khanwilkar on 14 November 2025?
Which company was awarded the title of India's most valuable brand in June 2025?
o: BEML Limited and Larsen & Toubro Limited

q: On 12 January 2025, which player was honoured with the Major Dhyan Chand Khel Ratna Award?

q: Who was given the Sahitya Akademi Award 2025 for studying and writing on the tribal communities and aspirations of rural Indian society and Jharkhand?

In September 2025, which ministry organised the Swachh Survekshan Award and 'Best City' recognition ceremony?
o: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

q: On 18 October 2025, the Chief Minister of UP, Yogi Adityanath, formally inaugurated and laid the foundation stone for the largest Integrated Trade and Exhibition Facility Centre in which city?
According to the Union Budget 2025-26, how much amount has been allocated to farmers, fishermen and dairy farmers through the Kisan Credit Card (KCC)?
Who are the authors of the book 'Original Sin' published in May 2025?
o: Kathryn Paige Harden and K Arumugam

q: The Parliament of India passed the Immigration and Foreigners Bill in April ___.
Before winning the Arjuna Award in 2024, who became the first female swimmer to achieve which historic feat?
o: First Asian swimmer to swim the English Channel
First Asian woman to swim across the Palk Strait
